seoTitle: Gamma Capital Membership — Choose Your Level of Access
seoDescription: Two membership tiers: Premium access to the private Discord community and the Black Label tier with real-time algorithmic flow data and instant bot notifications.
heroTitle: Two Tiers. One Mission: Clarity in the Markets.
heroSubtitle: Choose the level that fits your style
heroDescription: From the manually curated options flow channel to real-time algorithmic monitoring with automatic scoring — choose the depth that matches your operational approach.
insideSectionTitle: Two Experiences, Two Levels of Depth
insideSectionDescription: Every membership gives you access to the private Gamma Capital Discord community. The difference is in the tools available and the intensity of the information flow.

insideFeatures.text: Access to the private Discord community and shared channels
Options flow channel with signals manually curated by the Gamma Capital team
Daily newsletter with the most relevant market news
Daily summary of upcoming macro events that can move the markets
Introductory educational material on options, flows and smart money logic
Black Label only: real-time algorithmic flow data with automatic scoring and instant bot notifications

keyBenefits.title: Structured Signals, Not Noise
keyBenefits.description: Every flagged flow passes through filters refined over years. No spam, no hype — only what matters.

keyBenefits.title: Early Information Advantage
keyBenefits.description: Monitor institutional behavior before the majority of retail traders even notice.

keyBenefits.title: A Serious, Curated Community
keyBenefits.description: A private environment for investors who want focus, real analysis and zero confusion.

keyBenefits.title: Proven Methodology
keyBenefits.description: The same analytical approach used in our institutional consulting — adapted for daily operational use.

keyBenefits.title: Educational Foundation Included
keyBenefits.description: Even if you're just starting, the introductory material guides you through options, flows and the logic behind smart money moves.

pricingSectionDescription: The Premium plan gives you full access to the community and the content curated by the team. accessSteps.title: Choose Your Tier
accessSteps.description: Select Premium or Black Label and choose the duration that works for you.

accessSteps.title: Checkout via Stripe
accessSteps.description: Secure payment in seconds. No manual data entry required.

accessSteps.title: Role Activated
accessSteps.description: Your Discord role is assigned automatically after payment.

accessSteps.title: Instant Access
accessSteps.description: You're in immediately. At expiration, renew or cancel freely — your role updates accordingly.

accessTagline: No friction, no manual steps, no waiting.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Premium and Black Label?
faqs.answer: The Premium plan includes access to the Discord community, manually curated flow signals from the team, the daily newsletter, the macro calendar and educational material. Black Label adds the full algorithmic layer: real-time flows with automatic scoring and instant bot notifications on every relevant move, filtered using our proprietary parameters.

faqs.question: Does Black Label include everything in Premium?
faqs.answer: Yes. Black Label is a higher tier that includes everything in Premium, plus access to the real-time algorithmic layer.

faqs.question: Do I need trading experience to join?
faqs.answer: Basic market knowledge helps, but the community is designed to be accessible even for investors who are still learning. The educational material is included for exactly this reason.

faqs.question: Do you provide trade signals?
faqs.answer: No. We provide structure, context and strategic insights — not blind trade calls. The operational decision always remains yours.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can cancel at any moment; access remains valid until the end of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: How do free trials work?
faqs.answer: You get full access during the trial period. If you cancel before it ends, you will not be charged.

faqs.question: What markets do you focus on?
faqs.answer: Primarily U.S. equities, options and flow-based signals tied to institutional activity.

comingSoonDescription: Gamma Capital constantly evolves. New tools and channels will be added progressively, including:

finalCtaTitle: Ready to See the Markets with More Clarity?
